import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from transformers import CLIPModel


class CLIPWildlifeClassifier(nn.Module):
    """Fine-tune CLIP vision backbone with a linear classifier head."""
    def __init__(self, model_name='openai/clip-vit-base-patch16', num_classes=182, dropout=0.0):
        super().__init__()
        # Load CLIP without text tower (we only need vision)
        self.clip = CLIPModel.from_pretrained(model_name)
        # Freeze text encoder; we will only use vision encoder
        for param in self.clip.text_model.parameters():
            param.requires_grad = False
        # logit_scale is a scalar Parameter; freeze it
        if hasattr(self.clip, 'logit_scale'):
            self.clip.logit_scale.requires_grad = False
        if hasattr(self.clip, 'text_projection'):
            self.clip.text_projection.requires_grad = False
        
        hidden_dim = self.clip.config.projection_dim  # ViT-B/16: 512, ViT-L/14: 768
        self.classifier = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_classes)
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout) if dropout > 0 else nn.Identity()
        
    def forward(self, pixel_values):
        # CLIP vision forward returns BaseModelOutput with pooler_output (image embeddings)
        vision_outputs = self.clip.vision_model(pixel_values=pixel_values)
        pooled = vision_outputs.pooler_output  # shape [B, hidden_dim]
        pooled = self.dropout(pooled)
        logits = self.classifier(pooled)
        return logits
